news.t: 21shares Launches First-Ever Crypto Market Index ETFs Registered Under the '40 Act in the U.S.
21shares launches two US crypto index ETFs

overview.description: The 21Shares FTSE Crypto 10 Index ETF (TTOP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long cryptocurrency basket, short usd currency. The fund tracks an index of the top 10 crypto assets, selected and weighted by their market capitalization. The fund invests in crypto assets through ETFs, ETPs, and other financial instruments. TTOP was launched on Nov 13, 2025 and is issued by 21Shares.
infoTable: FTSE Crypto 10 Select Index - Benchmark Price Return
